figure_captions.assembly-robustness-response: Center-distance-envelope validity across preregistered positive allowances and shaft-location tolerances at zero housing erosion. Contact ratio remains nominal; outcomes are neither operating-engagement nor manufacturing-yield measurements.
figure_captions.solver-anytime-largest-domain: Feasible recovery and negative-proof rate on the largest declared tooth domain across method-specific evaluation limits. Incomplete stochastic non-discoveries are unknown, not negative classifications.

highlights: Certificates bind exact requirements and candidates to independent checks.
Complete bounded search distinguishes negative proofs from heuristic failure.
Executable schema rules expose registered mutations missed by structure alone.
Preregistered robustness rejects global housing-clearance equivalence.
Outer-replicated selection fails its preregistered improvement threshold.
